milestones.title: 01 — Programme Mobilisation, Governance and Discovery
milestones.description:
## Objective
Mobilise the programme, confirm governance, validate scope and establish the delivery baseline.

## Business outcome
A governed programme with approved decision rights, delivery controls, stakeholder alignment and an evidence-based discovery backlog.

## Scope
- Programme charter and benefits case
- Stakeholder register, RACI and escalation model
- Steering Committee, PMO, Technical Working Group and Clinical/M&E forums
- RAID log, reporting calendar and reporting SLAs
- Clinical, facility, connectivity and integration discovery
- Initial architecture, security and data-classification baselines

## Dependencies
- Named client and supplier representatives
- Access to existing project documents and facilities
- Availability of clinical, technical and governance stakeholders

## Definition of done
- [ ] Programme charter approved
- [ ] Governance forums and reporting calendar active
- [ ] Discovery findings documented
- [ ] RAID register established
- [ ] Backlog prioritised for the next two milestones

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Steering Committee accepts scope and governance
- [ ] Clinical and technical leads validate discovery outputs
- [ ] Monthly reporting SLA is approved

## Governance checkpoints
- Weekly PMO sync
- Fortnightly progress dashboard
- Mobilisation gate
- Steering Committee approval

## Planned dates
- Start: 2026-07-13
- Completion: 2026-08-14

milestones.title: 02 — UX, Figma Design System and Clinical Workflow Validation
milestones.description:
## Objective
Design and validate an accessible, multilingual and clinically coherent user experience.

## Business outcome
An executive-ready Figma prototype and reusable design system validated by clinical, operational and accessibility stakeholders.

## Scope
- Design tokens and component library
- Patient, doctor, nurse, specialist, administration, executive and platform-administration portals
- Authentication, appointment, triage, consultation, referral and audit flows
- Desktop, tablet and mobile layouts
- Eleven written official languages plus SASL accessibility/interpreter patterns
- Design-to-development handoff

## Dependencies
- Discovery outputs
- Clinical workflow owners
- Brand and accessibility guidance

## Definition of done
- [ ] Priority frames and interactions complete
- [ ] Clinical workflow review completed
- [ ] Accessibility review completed
- [ ] Handoff package committed

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Clinical leads approve priority journeys
- [ ] Product owner approves responsive portal structure
- [ ] Accessibility and localisation gaps are logged

## Governance checkpoints
- Weekly design critique
- Fortnightly clinical workflow review
- Architecture review
- UX acceptance gate

## Planned dates
- Start: 2026-07-27
- Completion: 2026-09-25

milestones.title: 03 — Next.js Role-Based Portal Application
milestones.description:
## Objective
Implement the responsive role-based portal application in Next.js.

## Business outcome
A functional, accessible and multilingual demonstration application supporting representative clinical and administrative journeys.

## Scope
- Canonical Next.js App Router application
- Shared UI components and design tokens
- Role-aware navigation and routing
- Seven priority role portals
- Localisation framework and SASL workflows
- Synthetic data and representative interactions
- Unit, component and end-to-end test baseline

## Dependencies
- Approved Figma designs
- Role and permission model
- Synthetic data definitions

## Definition of done
- [ ] Priority portals implemented
- [ ] Responsive layouts validated
- [ ] Representative journeys demonstrable
- [ ] Automated build and tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Product owner approves demo journeys
- [ ] Accessibility defects have agreed disposition
- [ ] No critical security or clinical-safety defects

## Governance checkpoints
- Fortnightly sprint review
- Monthly executive demo
- Clinical review gate
- Release readiness gate

## Planned dates
- Start: 2026-08-24
- Completion: 2026-11-20

milestones.title: 04 — Azure SQL Data Platform and Application APIs
milestones.description:
## Objective
Build the governed Azure SQL data platform and secure application-service boundaries.

## Business outcome
A testable Azure-native backend with controlled data access, migration, audit and reporting capabilities.

## Scope
- Logical and physical data model
- Azure SQL schema and migrations
- API contracts and service layer
- Synthetic seed data
- Row-Level Security where appropriate
- Stored procedures and governed reporting views
- Audit and integration-event models
- Backup, restore, performance and data-quality controls

## Dependencies
- Approved domain model
- Azure subscription and networking decisions
- Identity and RBAC design

## Definition of done
- [ ] Schema and migrations operational
- [ ] Server-side authorisation enforced
- [ ] Core APIs documented and tested
- [ ] Backup and restore baseline validated
- [ ] Sensitive actions generate audit events

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Architecture board approves data model
- [ ] Security approves access controls
- [ ] Test evidence confirms role and facility isolation

## Governance checkpoints
- Data architecture review
- Security review
- Migration approval gate
- Restore-test evidence review

## Planned dates
- Start: 2026-10-05
- Completion: 2027-01-15

milestones.title: 05 — Microsoft Entra ID, Enterprise Application and RBAC
milestones.description:
## Objective
Implement enterprise identity, application registration and least-privilege RBAC using Microsoft Entra ID.

## Business outcome
Secure, auditable access for priority roles with MFA, Conditional Access alignment and controlled lifecycle management.

## Scope
- App and enterprise application registration
- OpenID Connect and OAuth 2.0
- Application roles and group mapping
- MFA and Conditional Access alignment
- Joiner, mover and leaver workflows
- Managed identities and service principals
- Graph permissions and admin consent
- PIM, break-glass and access-review procedures

## Dependencies
- Tenant access
- Approved role matrix
- Security and privacy policies

## Definition of done
- [ ] Representative roles authenticate successfully
- [ ] Server-side claims validation implemented
- [ ] Provisioning and deprovisioning documented
- [ ] Least-privilege review complete
- [ ] Access-review process established

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Identity owner approves configuration
- [ ] Security validates MFA and role enforcement
- [ ] Audit evidence is retrievable

## Governance checkpoints
- Identity design review
- Permission consent review
- Security acceptance gate
- Access-certification rehearsal

## Planned dates
- Start: 2026-11-16
- Completion: 2027-02-26

milestones.title: 06 — Teams, WhatsApp and HL7 FHIR Integrations
milestones.description:
## Objective
Implement governed collaboration, patient communication and health-data interoperability services.

## Business outcome
Demonstrable end-to-end consultation, notification and standards-based clinical exchange workflows.

## Scope
- Teams and Microsoft Graph meetings and calendar
- WhatsApp Business templates, consent and webhooks
- FHIR R4 resource mappings and validation
- Integration APIs, queues, retries and dead-letter handling
- Terminology, provenance and AuditEvent controls
- Sandbox, mock-service and contract-test harnesses

## Dependencies
- Entra permissions
- Approved WhatsApp Business configuration
- FHIR integration strategy
- Azure Service Bus and API Management baseline

## Definition of done
- [ ] Teams consultation flow demonstrable
- [ ] WhatsApp notification journeys demonstrable
- [ ] Priority FHIR resources validated
- [ ] Integration telemetry operational
- [ ] Security and privacy reviews complete

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Clinical and integration owners approve workflows
- [ ] Consent and opt-out controls validated
- [ ] Contract tests pass for priority exchanges

## Governance checkpoints
- Integration design review
- Clinical safety review
- Privacy review
- End-to-end integration gate

## Planned dates
- Start: 2026-12-14
- Completion: 2027-04-09

milestones.title: 07 — Azure Infrastructure, DevSecOps and Observability
milestones.description:
## Objective
Establish reproducible Azure infrastructure, secure delivery pipelines and operational observability.

## Business outcome
A repeatable, monitored and security-hardened Azure platform suitable for demonstration and pilot progression.

## Scope
- Landing zone and resource groups
- Infrastructure as code
- App hosting, Azure SQL, Storage, Key Vault, Service Bus and API Management
- Private connectivity, TLS, DNS and secure ingress
- GitHub Actions CI/CD and environment promotion
- Azure Monitor, Application Insights and Log Analytics
- Defender, vulnerability scanning, backup and recovery

## Dependencies
- Azure subscription and policy access
- Architecture decisions
- Environment and security requirements

## Definition of done
- [ ] Infrastructure deployed from code
- [ ] CI/CD promotes through controlled environments
- [ ] Secrets remain outside source control
- [ ] Monitoring and alerting operational
- [ ] Backup, rollback and recovery tested

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Platform owner approves environment
- [ ] Security hardening checklist completed
- [ ] Deployment and recovery evidence accepted

## Governance checkpoints
- Cloud architecture review
- Monthly cost and capacity review
- Security assurance gate
- Operational readiness review

## Planned dates
- Start: 2027-01-11
- Completion: 2027-05-14

milestones.title: 08 — Pilot Readiness, Testing, Training and Demonstration
milestones.description:
## Objective
Validate the integrated solution and prepare selected facilities and support teams for a controlled pilot.

## Business outcome
A tested, trained and operationally supported pilot candidate with clear go/no-go evidence.

## Scope
- System, integration, performance, accessibility and security testing
- Clinical workflow and user-acceptance testing
- Training materials and role-based enablement
- Support model and operational runbooks
- Synthetic demo data and reset procedures
- Executive demo checklist and pilot readiness assessment

## Dependencies
- Integrated application and Azure environment
- Named pilot facilities and users
- Approved test and training plans

## Definition of done
- [ ] Critical test suites pass
- [ ] High-risk defects resolved or accepted
- [ ] Training delivered and evaluated
- [ ] Support and escalation model operational
- [ ] Pilot readiness pack approved

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Clinical, security, product and operations sign-offs obtained
- [ ] Pilot users demonstrate role workflows
- [ ] Go/no-go decision recorded

## Governance checkpoints
- Weekly defect triage
- UAT checkpoint
- Training readiness review
- Pilot go/no-go board

## Planned dates
- Start: 2027-04-12
- Completion: 2027-06-18

milestones.title: 09 — Production Readiness, Operational Handover and Scale-Out
milestones.description:
## Objective
Complete production-readiness assurance, operational handover and the scale-out roadmap.

## Business outcome
A governed production transition plan with accountable support ownership, compliance evidence and measurable expansion priorities.

## Scope
- Production architecture and security review
- Penetration-test remediation
- Operational acceptance and service transition
- SLA, incident, change and problem management
- Compliance and audit evidence pack
- Benefits baseline and KPI framework
- Scale-out plan for additional facilities and integrations
- Year-two roadmap and budget inputs

## Dependencies
- Pilot evidence
- Production hosting approval
- Support ownership and contractual SLAs

## Definition of done
- [ ] Production readiness assessment complete
- [ ] Operational handover accepted
- [ ] Outstanding risks have owners and dates
- [ ] Compliance evidence pack complete
- [ ] Scale-out roadmap approved

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Executive Steering Committee records production decision
- [ ] Operations accepts service ownership
- [ ] Security, privacy and clinical governance approvals documented

## Governance checkpoints
- Production readiness review
- Operational acceptance gate
- Executive close-out
- Year-two roadmap approval

## Planned dates
- Start: 2027-05-17
- Completion: 2027-07-09
